summary: R6 — Group connectivity modules (matchmake.rs, punch.rs, stun.rs, lan_discovery.rs, net_detect.rs) into connectivity/ subfolder with re-export mod.rs; move handler wiring out of main.rs

resolution.note: Moved matchmake.rs, punch.rs, stun.rs, lan_discovery.rs, net_detect.rs into connectivity/ subfolder. connectivity/mod.rs re-exports all + register_handlers() extracted from main.rs. lib.rs pub use preserves all call sites. cargo test --workspace --no-run passes.
